scripts.release:
cd frontend && npm run build && cd .. && copy backend\src\index.js build ackend-server.js && copy backend\package.json build\ && cd build && npm install && cd .. && cmd /c "set NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED=0 && neu update" && neu build && copy build\package.json dist\CepreHorarios\ && copy build
eutralino.js dist\CepreHorarios\ && xcopy build
ode_modules dist\CepreHorarios
ode_modules /E /I /Y && xcopy backend\src dist\CepreHorarios\src /E /I /Y && copy build ackend-server.js dist\CepreHorarios ackend-server.js && move dist\CepreHorarios ackend-server.js dist\CepreHorarios\src\index.js && xcopy resources
ode dist\CepreHorarios
ode /E /I /Y
scripts.release-windows: cd frontend && npm run build && cd .. && copy backend\src\index.js build\backend-server.js && copy backend\package.json build\ && cd build && npm install && cd .. && neu update && neu build
